title: The Social Media Break
content: After noticing how much time she spent scrolling through social media, Sofia decided to take a short break. For two weeks, she removed the applications from her phone and limited online activity. During that period, she spent more time reading, exercising, and meeting friends in person. At first, she worried about missing important updates, but those concerns gradually disappeared. By the end of the experiment, she felt less distracted and more focused. Although she eventually returned to social media, she developed healthier habits and became more intentional about how she used digital platforms.
